name: generate_mockup
description: Create realistic product mockup images by combining your design files with product templates. Returns a task ID that can be polled for the resulting mockup image URLs.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: The Printful catalog product ID to generate mockups for.

parameters.name: variant_ids
parameters.description: Array of variant IDs to generate mockups for. If omitted, mockups are generated for all variants.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Array of print file objects, each with a placement (e.g., 'front') and image_url pointing to the design file.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output image format: jpg or png. Defaults to jpg.
